title: Change RunOptions.Stdin/Stdout/Stderr to just be Reader/Writers
body: Change `RunOptions.Stdin` from a `ReadCloser` to a `Reader`, since we weren't closing it.  Likewise, change `RunOptions.Stdout` and `.Stderr` from `WriteCloser`s to `Writer`s, since we weren't closing them, either.
